return(function(U,j,k,s,T,r,o,K,F,Y,p,I,n,w,b,S,y,x,d,D)K,w,S,I,F,x,d,b,p,n,y,Y,D=function(U)local H,p=568078-568077,U[-708982-(-708983)]while p do
